channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: AUDA-NEPAD urges accelerated efforts for African trade and development
item.description: Delegates in Cape Town marked 25 years of AUDA-NEPAD with calls for faster African economic integration, warning that the continent risks falling further behind global trade and development. Former Pr...

item.title: Remembering Maria McCloy: The Woman Who Shaped Johannesburg’s Culture
item.description: Maria McCloy was a remarkable figure whose influence stretched across Johannesburg’s cultural, social, and creative landscapes. She brought people together across class, art, music, fashion, and polit...

item.title: UK train operators to be evaluated on measures against sexual harassment
item.description: The British government has introduced a new scheme under which train operators will be assessed by the British Transport Police (BTP) on how they handle sexual harassment on trains. Companies will be ...

item.title: First International Big Cat Alliance Summit in Delhi Postponed Following India-Africa Forum Decision
item.description: The inaugural International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA) Summit, initially scheduled for 1st June 2026 in New Delhi, has been postponed to a later date, the Union Environment Ministry announced on Thursday...

item.title: Arizona Veterans Call on Republicans to Support War Powers Resolution Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: Arizona veterans gathered at the state Capitol to call on Republican lawmakers to support a War Powers Resolution aimed at limiting President Donald Trump's ability to continue military action against...

item.title: Clatous Chama Leads Simba SC to Premier League Summit
item.description: Zimbabwean midfielder Clatous Chama, popularly known as 'Triple C,' has been central to Simba Sports Club's rise back to the top of the Tanzanian Premier League. His technical skills, vision, and lead...

item.title: Latino Voter Shift Poses Challenge for Texas Republicans Ahead of 2026 Midterms
item.description: Texas Republicans are confronting a significant political challenge as Latino voters in the state increasingly favor Democratic candidates. According to recent polling from Texas Public Opinion Resear...

item.title: Comedians in ‘Sigabo’ Encouraged to Improvise During Filming, Says Jerald Napoles
item.description: Jerald Napoles, a well-known actor and comedian in the Philippines, recently shared insights about the upcoming comedy series 'Sigabo'. According to Napoles, the comedians working on the show are give...

item.title: Legal Recognition of Casual Work in Nigeria Does Not Justify Exploitative Practices
item.description: For Nigeria, casual employment, also called Non-Standard Work Arrangement (NSWA), dey common but e no dey permanent. Workers wey dey casual often dey miss out on job security, pension, health, and lif...

item.title: Dexys Midnight Runners reveal first new album since 1985 with UK and European tour
item.description: Dexys Midnight Runners are returning with a new album titled ‘Love’, their first under this name since 1985’s ‘Don’t Stand Me Down’. The lead single, ‘My Life In England Pt. 1’, revisits the track ori...

item.title: Professor Tissot's Theory on the Biological Origin of Disease
item.description: A century-old article discusses a revolutionary theory presented by Professor Tissot before the French Academy of Science, proposing a new understanding of bacillar diseases and life itself. According...

item.title: Celebrating Lunar New Year in 1960s Manhattan’s Chinatown
item.description: In the early 1960s, Manhattan’s Chinatown came alive during the Lunar New Year, showcasing a vibrant mix of tradition and community spirit. The neighborhood, smaller and tightly knit compared to today...

item.title: Trump struggles with independent and moderate Republican support ahead of 2026 midterms
item.description: President Donald Trump is facing declining support among key voter groups, raising concerns about the potential impact on the 2026 midterm elections. Political analyst Paul Rieckhoff, host of the 'Ind...

item.title: Take-Two projects $8.1 billion revenue for FY27, largely driven by GTA 6 launch
item.description: Take-Two Interactive is forecasting record revenue for fiscal year 2027, largely fueled by the upcoming release of Grand Theft Auto 6. The company expects net revenue between $7.9 and $8.1 billion, wi...

item.title: Mitochondrial l-2-Hydroxyglutarate Acts as a Physiological Signaling Molecule with Functional Roles
item.description: A recent study published in Nature investigates the role of l-2-hydroxyglutarate (l-2-HG), a metabolite traditionally considered toxic, in normal physiological processes. The researchers found that l-...

item.title: West Bengal Government Requires Prior Approval for Officials to Communicate with Media
item.description: The newly formed Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) government in West Bengal has issued an order restricting state government officials from speaking to the media or sharing information without prior permi...

item.title: How French Philosophers Influenced the Rise of Woke Ideology in the West
item.description: In this opinion piece, Brivael Le Pogam argues that modern 'wokism' can be traced back to French intellectual movements, particularly the works of Michel Foucault, Jacques Derrida, and Gilles Deleuze....

item.title: Tackling Maternal Mortality: Preventing Deaths from Postpartum Haemorrhage
item.description: Maternal deaths remain a serious concern in Kenya, especially from preventable causes like postpartum haemorrhage (PPH). According to the Ministry of Health, the country loses 15 mothers, 92 newborns,...

item.title: Protests erupt in Nuuk as U.S. opens first consulate in Greenland since 1950s
item.description: The inauguration of a new U.S. consulate in Nuuk, Greenland, has prompted public demonstrations amid local concerns over American influence on the island. This marks the first permanent U.S. diplomati...

item.title: Thomas Tuchel's England World Cup Squad: Foden, Palmer and Maguire Omitted
item.description: Thomas Tuchel is expected to name his 26-man England squad on Friday for the 2026 World Cup, which will be held across the United States, Mexico, and Canada. According to reports, several notable play...
